discovery.name: US_LDG_BALANCE_AND_ASSIGNED_PAYREL
discovery.sql: SELECT ldg.name AS LDG_NAME, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=1 THEN c.prn END) AS PRN1, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=1 THEN c.payname END) AS PAY1, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=2 THEN c.prn END) AS PRN2, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=2 THEN c.payname END) AS PAY2, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=3 THEN c.prn END) AS PRN3, MAX(CASE WHEN c.rn=3 THEN c.payname END) AS PAY3 FROM pay_legislative_data_groups ldg CROSS JOIN (SELECT prn, payname, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY prn) rn FROM (SELECT DISTINCT pr.payroll_relationship_number prn, pl.payroll_name payname, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pr.payroll_relationship_number ORDER BY pl.payroll_name) r2 FROM pay_assigned_payrolls_dn ap JOIN pay_pay_relationships_dn pr ON ap.payroll_term_id BETWEEN pr.payroll_relationship_id AND pr.payroll_relationship_id+6 AND pr.legislative_data_group_id=300000046974970 JOIN per_all_people_f p ON p.person_id=pr.person_id AND SYSDATE BETWEEN p.effective_start_date AND p.effective_end_date JOIN pay_all_payrolls_f pl ON pl.payroll_id=ap.payroll_id AND SYSDATE BETWEEN pl.effective_start_date AND pl.effective_end_date WHERE ap.legislative_data_group_id=300000046974970 AND REGEXP_LIKE(pr.payroll_relationship_number,'^[0-9]+$')) WHERE r2=1) c WHERE ldg.legislative_data_group_id=300000046974970 AND c.rn<=3 GROUP BY ldg.name

base_read._comment: Base table for the HDL load of this object is the balance batch line, PAY_BAL_BATCH_LINES, joined to its header PAY_BAL_BATCH_HEADERS on this run's prefixed batch name DMTW2<prefix>. NOTE: use the PAY_BAL_BATCH_* tables (the live, current tables), NOT PAY_BALANCE_BATCH_* -- that similarly-named replica is stale by months in this BIP relay (max creation_date frozen at 2026-04-14). HDL upload+load writes the accepted lines here (the good rows), keyed by PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_NUMBER. The bad line references a nonexistent PayrollRelationshipNumber (<prefix>BADPRN), which HDL cannot resolve, so it errors at load and no line is written -- proven by the load-time HDL message plus absence from this base read. The downstream Load Initial Balances ESS process then converts the accepted batch lines (status U = unprocessed) into actual balances in PAY_RUN_BALANCES -- that step is documented in GOLD_README but is not part of the standalone REST load path.
base_read.sql: SELECT l.payroll_relationship_number AS PRN, MAX(l.batch_line_id) AS BATCH_LINE_ID, MAX(l.batch_line_status) AS BATCH_LINE_STATUS, MAX(l.balance_name) AS BALANCE_NAME, MAX(l.value) AS VAL FROM pay_bal_batch_lines l JOIN pay_bal_batch_headers h ON h.batch_id=l.batch_id WHERE h.batch_name='DMTW2${PREFIX}' AND h.legislative_data_group_id=300000046974970 GROUP BY l.payroll_relationship_number
